column3: (X-Frame-Options Header Not Set - this is a JSON API with no HTML to frame, clickjacking via this header is not applicable)
(X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing - meaningful for an API returning JSON, should be set)
(X-Frame-Options Header Not Set - this is a JSON API with no HTML to frame, clickjacking via this header is not applicable)
(X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing - meaningful for an API returning JSON, should be set)

(Storable and Cacheable Content - findings are against 404 responses for non-existent endpoints like /robots.txt and /sitemap.xml, not real API surface; cache-control on 404s from a JSON API is not a meaningful security concern)
(Sec-Fetch-Dest Header Missing - this is a browser fetch metadata header sent by browsers, not API clients; not meaningful for a REST API and not expected to be present in ZAP scanner requests)
